info.title: openconfig-interfaces
info.description:
Model for managing network interfaces and subinterfaces.  This
module also defines convenience types / groupings for other
models to create references to interfaces:

 base-interface-ref (type) -  reference to a base interface
 interface-ref (grouping) -  container for reference to a
   interface + subinterface
 interface-ref-state (grouping) - container for read-only
   (opstate) reference to interface + subinterface

This model reuses data items defined in the IETF YANG model for
interfaces described by RFC 7223 with an alternate structure
(particularly for operational state data) and with
additional configuration items.

Portions of this code were derived from IETF RFC 7223.
Please reproduce this note if possible.

depth.name: depth
depth.description: limit the depth of nodes in response

fields.name: fields
fields.description: optionally identify specific data nodes in response

filter.name: filter
filter.description: xpath expression to filter data nodes in response

insert.name: insert
insert.description: controlling the order when adding new list elements

point.name: point
point.description: used to specify the insertion point

interface-name.name: interface-name
interface-name.description: References the name of the interface

subinterface-index.name: subinterface-index
subinterface-index.description:
The index number of the subinterface -- used to address
the logical interface
